positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized illustration of a magical, bioluminescent forest scene. The composition features stylized fauna, such as celestial deer silhouettes and luminous butterflies, gathered around a central, glowing crystal pool. The scene is framed by enormous, highly detailed, glowing fern-like flora and abstract geometric elements, creating a powerful sense of depth and mystery. The artistic style is a blend of elegant Art Nouveau linework and modern vector graphic design, utilizing a strong jewel-tone palette (deep sapphire, emerald, sapphire blue, and glowing gold accents) against a midnight black background. The lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes, strong contrast, and perfect print scalability for apparel.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poor composition, text, signature, watermark, dirty edges, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
